name: AKARI Keymaster
description: Read-only A2A credential agent for autonomous systems. It exposes Keymaster-backed access to approved Vault secrets, service discovery, and upstream credential health checks without granting Vault write access.

httpAuthSecurityScheme.description: Bearer token issued for Keymaster access. Send it in the Authorization header.

skills.name: Get Secret
skills.description: Fetch an approved secret for a given service and key name through the read-only Keymaster boundary.

skills.name: List Services
skills.description: List known service and key-name combinations that Keymaster can expose, including whether each key can be verified against an upstream API.

skills.name: List Secrets
skills.description: Enumerate retrievable secret paths in service/key_name form for workflow planning and audit-safe discovery.

skills.name: Health Check
skills.description: Check Keymaster reachability and validate known credentials against their upstream services before agents start critical work.
examples: Run a full secret health check

skills.name: Rotate Secret Instructions
skills.description: Explain the safe Vault-side rotation path when a secret must be changed, while keeping the A2A agent read-only.
examples: How do I rotate the Stripe live key?
Show the safe path for updating a secret
